policy.ordering: by release, then id; respect blockedBy

features.title: Monorepo & toolchain scaffold (Turborepo + pnpm + TS strict + lint/format/test)
acceptance: pnpm-workspace + turbo.json + base tsconfig (strict) build an empty workspace
ESLint (type-aware) + Prettier + Vitest configured; package-boundary lint rule present
verification gates typecheck/lint/format/test/build run green on the scaffold
features.notes: Done 2026-06-28: gates active; @tessera/core shell stands up the toolchain (F-002 fleshes it out).

features.title: @tessera/core: ids, typed errors, config types, domain event bus
acceptance: Stable id helpers, typed error base classes, and result/error types
In-memory domain event bus with typed events
No internal dependencies; consumable by all packages

features.title: Storage ports + SQLite & filesystem adapters + conformance suite
acceptance: RelationalStore + BlobStore + Queue ports defined (Drizzle for SQL)
SQLite, filesystem, and in-process queue adapters implemented
Shared conformance suite passes for every adapter
features.notes: Done 2026-06-28: 3 ports + 3 local adapters (sqlite via better-sqlite3+Drizzle, filesystem, in-process), each passing a conformance suite; 13 storage tests.

features.title: VectorStore port + sqlite-vec adapter (model+dim recorded per vector)
acceptance: VectorStore port with upsert/query and capability flags
sqlite-vec adapter passing the conformance suite
Each vector records its embedding model id + dimension
features.notes: Done 2026-06-28: VectorStore port + sqlite-vec adapter (vec0; model+dimension per vector) passing a 6-test conformance suite.

features.title: Embeddings port + Transformers.js adapter (Ollama optional)
acceptance: Embeddings port (embed/batch) with model metadata
Transformers.js in-process adapter works with zero external services/keys
Optional Ollama adapter behind the same port
features.notes: Done 2026-06-28: Embeddings port + transformers (live smoke-verified, all-MiniLM 384-d) + ollama (optional) + fake (deterministic, drives the conformance gate); real adapters' tests guarded by env.

features.title: Ingestion: local filesystem + Git, event-driven, incremental, secret-redacted
acceptance: Filesystem + Git connectors emit change events; workers process via Queue port
Incremental + idempotent (content-hash diffing); no full re-index on small changes
Secret scrubbing before persist; processors are plugins
features.notes: Done 2026-06-29: @tessera/ingestion — Connector/Processor/DocumentSink/IngestionManifest ports; filesystem + git (CLI, repo provenance) connectors; normalize + enforced-terminal redaction processors; content-hash diff → coordinator enqueues only changes → worker consumes via Queue port, idempotent/incremental. ADR-0015. 25 tests (connector conformance, fs + git integration, full pipeline lifecycle). Embedding/vector/graph persistence is the DocumentSink seam for F-007/8/9; full git history/diff/blame + fs.watch deferred.

features.title: Memory subsystem: types, metadata, versioning, manual capture
acceptance: Memory kinds (decision/lesson/incident/failure/architecture/glossary/task) with metadata
Versioned + supersedable (never silently mutated)
Create/edit via API + MCP
features.notes: Done 2026-06-29: @tessera/memory — 7 MemoryKinds + metadata; immutable version lineage (edit appends a superseding version, prior never mutated; FR-12); Zod-validated MemoryService (capture/edit/getCurrent/history/list) = the API/MCP-facing seam (F-011/F-012 wrap it); MemoryStore port + in-memory + sqlite (Drizzle over storage's handle, atomic supersede) adapters, both passing the conformance suite. 25 tests. Effect E-010. Auto-extraction (FR-14), retention (FR-15), migration tooling (F-024) deferred.

features.title: Knowledge graph + effect-links + get_effects
acceptance: Nodes/edges model (relational, recursive-CTE traversal) for files/symbols/modules/people/decisions
Effect-links typed with rationale/confidence/origin; static + manual
get_effects(symbol) returns ranked dependents with paths
features.notes: Done 2026-06-29: @tessera/knowledge-graph — node/edge model (file/symbol/module/person/decision/memory); typed effect-links (rationale/confidence/origin) asserted manually + derived statically by inverting import/call/reference edges (FR-18); get_effects = ranked, path-bearing traversal of dependents (FR-19). GraphStore port + in-memory (BFS) + sqlite (recursive CTE, cycle-guarded) adapters, both ranked through one shared selectBestRanked for parity; passing one conformance suite. Zod-validated service = API/MCP seam. 23 tests. Effects E-002/E-011. Symbol extraction to populate nodes (OQ5) is downstream ingestion.

features.title: Hybrid retrieval: semantic + keyword + graph + symbolic + fusion ranker
acceptance: Five retrievers behind a common interface; keyword via FTS, semantic via VectorStore
Fusion ranker with configurable weights and per-candidate signal attribution
Returns one ranked candidate set
features.notes: Done 2026-06-29: @tessera/retrieval — Retriever interface; semantic (VectorStore), keyword (SQLite FTS5), graph (KG seed+effect-expand), symbolic (exact symbol) retrievers; weighted Reciprocal-Rank-Fusion ranker (configurable per-signal weights, per-candidate signal attribution) → one ranked set; Zod-validated hybrid service (API/MCP seam). 23 tests. Effect E-012. NOTE: requirements are FR-21/22/23/25/26 (4 retrievers + fusion) — temporal (FR-24) is R1/F-018, the 5th behind the same interface; the acceptance's 'five' counts it. Consistent cross-backend ref space for fusion is an ingestion/config seam (downstream).

features.title: Context Compiler: plan→retrieve→expand→rank→dedup→compress→assemble + provenance
acceptance: Full pipeline producing a provenance-tagged, token-budget-bounded Context Package
Deduplication + per-fragment 'why included' explainability
Compilation trace emitted for the Package Inspector
Beats naive top-k RAG on the labeled task suite (Context Quality Score)
features.notes: Done 2026-06-29: @tessera/context-compiler — compile(task,budget,filters) runs plan→retrieve→expand(get_effects)→rank→resolve→dedup(shingle Jaccard)→compress(budget-fit, never exceeds)→assemble. Provenance-tagged, sectioned, budget-bounded ContextPackage + per-fragment whyIncluded (FR-32) + full CompilationTrace (stage drops) for the inspector. FragmentSource = corpus seam. CQS + naiveTopK baseline; beats-naive eval test passes (compiler > naive on relevance/redundancy/provenance/overall). 17 tests. Effects E-003/E-013. LLM compression (FR-31), reproducibility/caching + pluggable-per-stage (FR-33/34) are R1 (F-019/F-020).

features.title: REST API /v1 (Fastify): schema validation, OpenAPI, health/ready
acceptance: Versioned /v1 routes for search/compile/effects/memory; Zod validation at boundary
OpenAPI generated from schemas; consistent error envelope
/health and /ready endpoints
features.notes: Done 2026-06-29: apps/api (@tessera/api) — Fastify v5 + fastify-type-provider-zod (Zod-v4 bridge: one schema drives validation+serialization+OpenAPI) + @fastify/swagger at GET /v1/openapi.json. Thin /v1 routes wrap the F-007..F-010 services: POST /v1/search, POST /v1/compile, GET /v1/effects, POST/GET/PATCH /v1/memory(/:lineageId[/history]). Consistent error envelope {error:{code,message,details?}} via one setErrorHandler (TesseraError.code->status; 5xx masked; Zod->400) + setNotFoundHandler. /health + /ready (injected readiness probe; 503 until ready). buildServer(services) is pure DI — the ApiServices composition seam F-015 fills with the real local profile (no shipped boot/toy wiring here); MCP (F-012) wraps the same services. e2e gate (gate 6) ACTIVATED: root test:e2e -> turbo; CI step added (effect E-005); 14 app.inject e2e + 11 unit (error-map + schema). ADR-0016. Effect E-003 realized (REST half). Auth/CORS/rate-limit=F-025/F-016, SSE=F-021, SDK=F-022.

features.title: MCP server: search, compile_context, get_effects, capture_memory, explain
acceptance: MCP tools wrap the same domain services as REST
Works with at least one real agent client end-to-end
Tool inputs validated; errors surfaced cleanly
features.notes: Done 2026-06-29: apps/mcp (@tessera/mcp) — @modelcontextprotocol/sdk@1.29 McpServer; buildMcpServer(services) registers search/compile_context/get_effects/capture_memory/explain, wrapping the SAME F-007..F-010 services as REST via a TYPE-ONLY ApiServices import from @tessera/api (no Fastify in the MCP runtime — verified). Inputs validated by the SDK (classic Zod 3 raw shapes); results = text JSON + structuredContent, no outputSchema; errors masked into {error:{code,message,details?}} (same policy as REST). explain = compile -> project whyIncluded+provenance+trace (no bodies; pure buildExplanation). startMcpStdio = stdio transport. e2e drives a REAL SDK Client over InMemoryTransport.createLinkedPair (5 tools + clean NOT_FOUND + input rejection). 2 unit + 7 e2e. ADR-0017. Effect E-003 realized (MCP half). Gateway auth/quotas=F-026; bootable process+config=F-015.

features.title: Plugin SDK + plugin-host (discovery, config schema, lifecycle, isolation)
acceptance: Stable contracts for Connector/Processor/AIProvider/StorageBackend/RetrievalStrategy
Host: discovery + config validation + lifecycle + failure isolation
First-party connectors/embeddings use the same contracts as third parties
features.notes: Done 2026-06-29: @tessera/plugin-host — a uniform Plugin SDK ENVELOPE over the existing extension-point ports (does not re-define them) + a host. SDK: PluginKind (connector/processor/ai-provider/storage-backend/retrieval-strategy); Plugin<TConfig,TCapability> = manifest (id/kind/name/version + Zod configSchema) + setup(config,ctx)->PluginInstance whose capability IS the existing port; lifecycle hooks; PluginContext. createPluginHost: register(unique ids)/load(validate config->setup)/start/startAll/stop/stopAll/dispose/capability<T>/list({kind}). Failure isolation (FR-58): invalid config + setup/lifecycle errors -> failed (never throws out / never stops others); only unknown id throws. Heterogeneous plugins type-erased behind one localized cast (no any). First-party dogfooding: filesystemConnectorPlugin + fake/transformers embeddings plugins wrap the existing factories on the same contract; live in plugin-host (one-way dep on ingestion/ai; no cycle; domain packages untouched). 10 tests (7 host + 3 first-party integration). ADR-0020, effect E-016. SEAMS: error (not process/sandbox) isolation; a split plugin-sdk/plugin-host + wiring F-015 via the host are follow-ups.

features.title: Dashboard: global search + Context Package inspector + UX baseline
acceptance: Global search across code/memory/graph with provenance
Package Inspector renders stages/scores/sources from the compilation trace
UX baseline: ⌘K, themes, skeleton/empty/error states, toasts, virtualized lists; WCAG AA

features.title: Deployment profile & config loader (Local) with adapter wiring
acceptance: Validated config schema selects adapters/providers/budgets by profile
Local profile wires SQLite+sqlite-vec+filesystem+Transformers.js with zero external deps
Secrets via SecretsProvider port (env/file locally)
features.notes: Done 2026-06-29: @tessera/config — composition root. configSchema (classic Zod 3) + loadConfig(env,overrides) with TESSERA_* overrides (merged per section, validated, fail-fast). SecretsProvider port + env(prefixed process.env)/file(JSON map) adapters; require fails fast without echoing the value. createLocalRuntime(config) wires SQLite+sqlite-vec+filesystem+in-process queue+Transformers.js (zero external deps) → composes ApiServices (memory/graph/hybrid-search/compiler) + Runtime{stores,embeddings,keyword,readiness,close}; embedding dimension flows provider→vector store (ADR-0006); non-local profiles throw (F-023). Compiler corpus seam = blob-backed FragmentSource (createBlobFragmentSource/putFragment, JSON {kind,text,metadata}). ApiServices imported TYPE-ONLY (no api<->config cycle); runnable process bin kept outside both (follow-up). 13 tests incl. an integration test booting the real Local profile (:memory: + fake embeddings) exercising memory/graph/search/compile; real transformers env-guarded. ADR-0018, effect E-014. Budgets validated/exposed (applied at request layer); Postgres/cloud profile=F-023.

features.title: Observability baseline: OpenTelemetry traces + Pino logs + metrics
acceptance: OTel spans across API → service → compiler stage → adapter with correlation ids
Structured Pino logging that never logs secrets/raw ingested content
Core metrics (latency, queue depth, compile latency per stage)
features.notes: Done 2026-06-29: @tessera/observability — libraries use the OTel API only; the SDK is wired at the process (startTelemetry, no-op until then). createLogger=Pino+redaction of secret keys AND raw content (NFR-7; stderr mode for MCP); withSpan/currentTraceId (active-context nesting + correlation id); instruments (http/service/compile-stage histograms + queue-depth gauge) + recordCompileStageDurations; startTelemetry=NodeSDK+async context manager+HTTP auto-instrumentation (console exporters; OTLP follow-up); instrumentServices=ADDITIVE ApiServices wrapper (API->service spans + latency; compiler stage metrics) leaving domain packages untouched. Additive (non-breaking) to verified code: compiler TraceStage.durationMs (F-010), buildServer loggerInstance (F-011, Fastify v5). Wired into apps/server (instrument + logger + http-latency hook; telemetry gated by TESSERA_TELEMETRY=1, off by default; logging always on). 10 obs tests + 1 server test. ADR-0019, effect E-015. SEAMS: per-adapter spans, a fed queue-depth gauge (Queue port lacks depth), OTLP exporters — instruments exist, data wired later.

features.title: GitHub connector (PRs/issues) + auto memory extraction
Temporal retriever (recency / time-window weighting)
Compiler compression stage (citation-preserving)
Compiler reproducibility + caching + pluggable stage strategies
Realtime updates (SSE/WebSocket)
Generated TypeScript SDK from OpenAPI
Postgres + pgvector adapters + Docker Compose stack
Backup/restore + migration system
Multi-tenancy + org RBAC
MCP gateway (multi-client auth + quotas)
Governance & audit UI + full audit trail
UI foundation: design tokens/theming, base shadcn components, app shell, command palette
acceptance: Design tokens (semantic CSS vars) + light/dark/system theming per docs/design/DESIGN-SYSTEM.md
Base shadcn/ui components, app shell (sidebar + topbar), command palette (⌘K)
Skeleton/empty/error primitives, toasts, motion primitives; WCAG AA baseline

features.title: CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions) running the verification gates
acceptance: Workflow runs verify-state + typecheck/lint/format/test/build (+e2e) on Node 22/pnpm
Dependency audit + secret scanning; steps mirror .harness/verification/gates.json
Activates when a Git remote exists; branch protection requires green CI
features.notes: Done 2026-06-29: .github/workflows/ci.yml — verify job mirrors all 7 gates (state→typecheck→lint→format→test→build→e2e) on Node 22.16.0+pnpm 9 (effect E-005); security job = pnpm audit --audit-level=high; NEW secret-scan job = gitleaks-action@v2 over full history with a scoped .gitleaks.toml allowlist (tests/examples/docs/redaction-detectors excluded — production source still scanned; verified the only secret-format strings in the repo are in allowlisted tests/plans). Header documents activation-on-remote + branch protection requiring verify+security+secret-scan. ADR-0010 (no new ADR). CD (build/deploy) = R1 image/R2 cloud.

features.title: Billing & subscriptions (cloud) behind a Billing port (Dodo Payments)
features.notes: Direction per ADR-0011; gated on OQ4 (license/business model).

features.title: General-purpose execution harness (strategic-compact, continuous-learning, coding-standards; ECC-adapted)
acceptance: strategic-compact + continuous-learning + coding-standards skills present and wired into protocols (workflow, clean-state, definition-of-done)
Coding rules enriched (KISS/DRY/YAGNI, small functions, no magic numbers, parallel async, AAA tests)
MIT attribution to ECC in NOTICE.md; decision recorded in ADR-0013
features.notes: Done 2026-06-28. Harness tooling (ADR-0013); executable hooks deferred; ECC = standing reference for coding harness.

features.title: Runnable server entrypoints (REST + MCP) wiring the Local profile
acceptance: A REST entrypoint boots the Local profile (createLocalRuntime) and serves the /v1 API; graceful shutdown closes the runtime
An MCP entrypoint boots the Local profile and serves the tools over stdio
Lives outside @tessera/api and @tessera/config so the dependency graph stays acyclic
features.notes: Done 2026-06-29: apps/server (@tessera/server) — the runnable bin deferred from F-011/F-015 (ADR-0018). createServerRuntime = loadConfig(env+overrides) -> createLocalRuntime; startApiServer builds the F-011 server over runtime.services + listen (HOST/PORT, default 127.0.0.1:3000) + graceful close; startMcpServer = startMcpStdio (connected-server type derived via Awaited<ReturnType<...>> so no direct SDK dep). Executable bins src/bin/{api,mcp}.ts (#!/usr/bin/env node, package.json#bin tessera-api/tessera-mcp) with SIGINT/SIGTERM shutdown; MCP bin logs to stderr only. Depends on config+api+mcp; nothing depends on it -> acyclic. 2 tests: REST boots the real Local profile on an ephemeral port and answers /health,/ready,/v1/openapi.json over HTTP (offline, fake embeddings); MCP composition. Realizes the runnable-bins consumer on effect E-014. The engine is now bootable end-to-end.
